case_title: ALDYTH BELTANE et al VS. FRANK HARIRI et al

PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE OF MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANTS TO PROVIDE VERIFIED SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELTANE, ALDYTH BELTANE, BRAD D'AVANZO, TRICIA DAWSON, MICHAEL MOUNTAIN, JOHN SEGAL, RODNELL "RODNEY" VOSBERG, ALICIA FRANCO, HEATHER WU, JOANN

DISCOVERY 302, A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS ALDYTH BELTANE, BRAD BELTANE, TRICIA D'AVANZO, MICHAEL DAWSON, JOHN MOUNTAIN, RODNELL SEGAL, ALICIA VOSBERG, HEATHER FRANCO AND JOANN WU'S MOTION TO COMPEL PARTY AFFILIATED WITNESS ERNESTO SANTOS CAMPOS/QUALITY CONSTRUCTION CORP. TO RESPOND TO AND PRODUCE DOCUMENTS AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BE RE-FILED SOLELY AGAINST THE SUBPOENAED PARTIES. SANCTIONS DENIED. THE MOTION WAS MADE ON THE INCORRECT PREMISE THAT DEFENDANTS ARE RESPONSIBLE FOR THE DISCOVERY DEFICIENCIES OF THE SUBPOENAED PARTIES ON THE GROUNDS THAT THE SUBPOENAED PARTIES ARE 'PARTY-AFFILIATED' WITNESSES. THEY ARE NOT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED

DISCOVERY 302, A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS ALDYTH BELTANE, BRAD BELTANE, TRICIA D'AVANZO, MICHAEL DAWSON, JOHN MOUNTAIN, RODNELL SEGAL, ALICIA VOSBERG, HEATHER FRANCO AND JOANN WU'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANTS TO PROVIDE VERIFIED SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY, TO FURTHER SUPPLEMENT RESPONSES WITH WITNESS INFORMATION, AND TO PRODUCE SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSIVE DOCS, AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS - GRANTED AS TO ALL RELIEF SOUGHT BY THE MOTION EXCEPT FOR THE REQUESTS FOR FURTHER VERIFICATIONS AND FOR THE FINANCIAL LOAN DOCUMENTS. DEFENDANTS TO PROVIDE FURTHER RESPONSES BY DECEMBER 5, 2011. REQUEST FOR SANCTION IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

DECLARATION OF STEVEN J. MCDONALD IN SUPPORT OF MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANTS TO PROVIDE VERIFIED SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELTANE, ALDYTH BELTANE, BRAD D'AVANZO, TRICIA DAWSON, MICHAEL MOUNTAIN, JOHN SEGAL, RODNELL "RODNEY" VOSBERG, ALICIA FRANCO, HEATHER WU, JOANN

DISCOVERY 302, A R G U E D; PLAINTIFFS ALDYTH BELTANE, BRAD BELTANE, TRICIA D'AVANZO, MICHAEL DAWSON, JOHN MOUNTAIN, RODNELL SEGAL, ALICIA VOSBERG, HEATHER FRANCO AND JOANN WU'S MOTION TO COMPEL SUBPOENAED PARTIES TO COMPLY WITH DEPO SUBPOENAS; TO REQUIRE QUALITY CONST. TO PRODUCE BUSINESS RECORDS ON A DATE CERTAIN AND TO SUBSEQUENTLY REQUIRE ERNESTO SANTOS CAMPOS TO APPEAR FOR DEPOSITION IS GRANTED. NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 8 QUALITY CONSTRUCTION CORPORATION MUST PROVIDE A VERIFIED RESPONSE TO THE SUBPOENA STATING WITHOUT ANY OBJECTIONS WHAT, IF ANY, DOCUMENTS IT HAS IN ITS POSSESSION, CUSTODY AND CONTROL THAT ARE RESPONSIVE TO THE SUBPOENA, REGARDLESS OF WHETHER THOSE DOCUMENTS HAVE OR HAVE NOT BEEN PREVIOUSLY PRODUCED TO PLAINTIFFS AND MUST PRODUCE ALL SUCH DOCUMENTS TO PLAINTIFFS AT THE OFFICE OF PLAINTIFFS' COUNSEL. ON A MUTUALLY AGREEABLE DATE NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 16 MR. CAMPOS' DEPOSITION, AS THE PMK OF QUALITY CONSTRUCTION, MUST PROCEED. QUALITY CONSTRUCTION'S FAILURE TO PROPERLY RESPOND TO THE SUBPOENA LACKS SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

Mtn To Comel Subpoenaed Parties To Comply With Depo Subpoenas
Off Calendar Dec-06-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES - ATTY. JAYMEE FAITH SAGISI OF GREENSTEIN & MCDONALD, TEL. NO. 773-1240 EXT. 302 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFFS;
ATTY. ROSS MCLAURAN MADDEN, TEL. NO. 567-1212 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT QUALITY CONSTRUCTION CORPORATION.

RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFFS ALDYTH BELTANE, BRAD BELTANE, TRICIA D'AVANZO, MICHAEL DAWSON, JOHN MOUNTAIN, RODNELL SEGAL, ALICIA VOSBERG, HEATHER FRANCO AND JOANN WU'S Motion To Compel Subpoenaed Parties To Comply With Depo Subpoenas; to require Quality Const. to produce business records on a date certain and to subsequently require Ernesto Santos Campos to appear for deposition is Granted. No later than December 8 Quality Construction Corporation must provide a verified response to the subpoena stating without any objections what, if any, documents it has in its possession, custody and control that are responsive to the subpoena, regardless of whether those documents have or have not been previously produced to plaintiffs and must produce all such documents to plaintiffs at the office of plaintiffs' counsel. On a mutually agreeable date no later than December 16 Mr. Campos' deposition, as the PMK of Quality Construction, must proceed. Quality Construction's failure to properly respond to the subpoena lacks substantial justification. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. =302/HEK

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Party Affiliated Witness Ernesto Santos Campos/Quality Construction Corp. To Respond To And Produce Documents And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-16-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JAYMEE FAITH SAGISI OF GREENSTEIN & MCDONALD APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. FRED M. FELLER OF THE LAW OFFICES OF BURESH, KAPLAN & CHANG, TEL. NO. (510) 548-7474 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS ALDYTH BELTANE, BRAD BELTANE, TRICIA D'AVANZO, MICHAEL DAWSON, JOHN MOUNTAIN, RODNELL SEGAL, ALICIA VOSBERG, HEATHER FRANCO AND JOANN WU'S Motion To Compel Party Affiliated Witness Ernesto Santos Campos/Quality Construction Corp. To Respond To And Produce Documents And Request For Sanctions IS Denied without prejudice to be re-filed solely against the subpoenaed parties. Sanctions denied. The motion was made on the incorrect premise that defendants are responsible for the discovery deficiencies of the subpoenaed parties on the grounds that the subpoenaed parties are 'party-affiliated' witnesses. They are not. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported = (302/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendants To Provide Verified Supplemental Responses To Discovery, To Further Supplement Responses With Witness Information, And To Produce Supplemental Responsive Docs, And Request Fo Rsanctions
Off Calendar Nov-16-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS ALDYTH BELTANE, BRAD BELTANE, TRICIA D'AVANZO, MICHAEL DAWSON, JOHN MOUNTAIN, RODNELL SEGAL, ALICIA VOSBERG, HEATHER FRANCO AND JOANN WU'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendants To Provide Verified Supplemental Responses To Discovery, To Further Supplement Responses With Witness Information, And To Produce Supplemental Responsive Docs, And Request for sanctions - Granted as to all relief sought by the motion except for the requests for further verifications and for the financial loan documents. Defendants to provide further responses by December 5, 2011. REQUEST FOR SANCTION IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. =302/HEK
